---
title: "Home"
site: workflowr::wflow_site
output:
  workflowr::wflow_html:
    toc: false
editor_options:
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
# show the code on the website
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library("tidyverse")
```

```{r analyze_data}
dataframe <- read.delim("data_clinical_patient.txt", comment.char="#")
# filter out so only Stage 3 and 4
number <- dataframe %>%
  filter(AJCC_PATHOLOGIC_TUMOR_STAGE == "Stage III" | AJCC_PATHOLOGIC_TUMOR_STAGE == "Stage IIIA" | AJCC_PATHOLOGIC_TUMOR_STAGE == "Stage IIIB" | AJCC_PATHOLOGIC_TUMOR_STAGE == "Stage IIIC" | AJCC_PATHOLOGIC_TUMOR_STAGE == "Stage IV")  %>% 
  count()
number
```
